news.t: Active-bond ETFs see record demand. Did Vanguard's fee cuts include such funds?

overview.description: The iShares AAA CLO Active ETF (CLOA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in USD-denominated CLOs that are rated AAA. CLOA was launched on Jan 10, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Active-bond ETFs see record demand. Did Vanguard's fee cuts include such funds?
data.text: Investors have upped their interest in actively managed bond ETFs, pouring record capital into them in January as some paid up in hopes of stronger returns.
